back_translation: A song of ascents. Those who trust in the LORD are like Mount Zion, which cannot be moved but abides forever.
As the mountains surround Jerusalem, so the LORD surrounds His people, both now and forevermore.
For the scepter of the wicked will not rest upon the land allotted to the righteous, so that the righteous will not stretch out their hands to injustice.
O LORD, do good to those who are good, and to those who are upright in heart.
But those who turn aside to crooked ways, the LORD will banish them with the evildoers. Peace be upon Israel.
